symptom_vector: High memory usage leads to node memory saturation, causing system-wide performance degradation and service latency spikes

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: 节点aiops-k8s-01内存使用率异常，导致节点内存耗尽，引发依赖该节点的服务出现连锁延迟
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到Metric数据中node_memory_usage_rate指标异常，节点aiops-k8s-01虽然未在异常指标列表中直接显示，但通过节点与Pod映射关系发现该节点承载了多个关键服务Pod
Step 2: 分析Trace数据发现多个服务调用延迟激增，特别是cartservice→redis调用延迟增加11.09倍，checkoutservice→cartservice调用延迟增加100倍
Step 3: 确认节点内存异常与下游服务延迟激增存在时间相关性，且内存耗尽会导致Pod调度问题和性能降级

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Sudden increase or sustained high value above threshold
critical_checks.instruction: 检查所有节点的node_memory_usage_rate指标，特别是aiops-k8s-01节点，查看在故障时间段内内存使用率是否出现异常上升或持续高位

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Steady decline or sudden drop below threshold
critical_checks.instruction: 监测节点可用内存变化，aiops-k8s-08节点在故障期间可用内存减少19.5%（10.6GB→8.75GB），需要检查aiops-k8s-01的类似模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Significant latency spike in downstream services
critical_checks.instruction: 检查调用链中cartservice到redis的延迟（HMSET/HGET操作），延迟激增11.09-56.1倍表明底层存储服务出现性能瓶颈

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Cascading latency increase in upstream services
critical_checks.instruction: 分析上游服务checkoutservice调用cartservice的延迟，100倍增长表明故障在调用链中向上传播
